caption: A man with grey hair, wearing a light blue button-down shirt, stands behind a wooden podium in an indoor setting, appearing to give a presentation. He is positioned in front of brown window blinds. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they listen to him, including individuals with brown and grey hair. To the left of the presenter is a black speaker on a stand. The text "ORCA" is superimposed on the right side of the scene. The frames show minimal movement, as the speaker remains at the podium with his hands resting on papers, while the audience members stay seated. The background and lighting remain consistent throughout the sequence, capturing a static shot of a formal presentation or meeting.
